name: Fruit and Tofu Pie
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Firm tofu, squeezed to remove moisture
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat electric oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, combine peaches, coconut, 1/4 cup of the honey, flour, 1/2 teaspoon of cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix gently; spoon into pie shell.
3. In a blender, add tofu, eggs, cream cheese, remaining 3/4 cup honey, remaining 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, salt, and vanilla. Cover and blend until smooth.
4. Pour over peaches.
5. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until golden brown. Makes 8 servings.
